# opnsense_quagga_ospf_network (Data Source)

Reads an OSPF network on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `area` (String) OSPF area (e.g. 0.0.0.0).
- `area_range` (String) Optional area range summarization.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this network is enabled.
- `ip_address` (String) Network address.
- `netmask` (Number) Netmask bits.
